inputs.label: True Negatives (TN)
inputs.businessContext: Number of correctly predicted negative outcomes (e.g., non-defective items correctly identified as non-defective in quality inspection).

inputs.label: False Negatives (FN)
inputs.businessContext: Number of negative outcomes incorrectly predicted as positive (e.g., defective items missed, false escapes).

inputs.label: True Positives (TP)
inputs.businessContext: Number of positive outcomes correctly predicted as positive (e.g., defective items correctly identified).

inputs.label: False Positives (FP)
inputs.businessContext: Number of positive outcomes incorrectly predicted as negative (e.g., non-defective items incorrectly flagged as defective, false alarms).
